channel.title: Containers on I.M Blogging
channel.description: Recent content in Containers on I.M Blogging

item.title: Distrobox Is Why We Can Have Nice Things
item.author: imran@imranmustafa.net (Imran Mustafa)
item.description: In my last blog post I went over the best ways to get Nix working on Debian, so you could get tons of new packages on the system in a stable way. Not even a month later I found out about Distrobox which is a tool based around containerization, allowing you to bring any package manager and package repository to your distro of choice. Is Distrobox Right For You? Distrobox is essentially a wrapper around a container engine.
